title: I get an error message connecting Monday to Zapier

posts.author: scalesolutions (Julian Fritsch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
if i paste in my Monday Api into Zapier, there is always an error message, please help.

It says: We hit an error adding your new account

authentication failed: Error parsing response. We got: “ <!–[if I”

  1. Make sure you click “Allow” or “Accept” on the permission popup
  2. Double check your Account has the correct permissions
  3. Check out our help docs for more information

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @scalesolutions!

Apologies, this morning we experienced a bit of a downtime with regards to our API, automations, and integrations features.

The issue has been resolved now. Please do let us know if you continue to run into any trouble!

Thanks~
